subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken unto the call of this Wayfaring Stranger, Who hath journeyed unto God and hath severed Himself from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین اسمع ندآء هذا المسافر الغریب الذی هاجر الی الله ثم انقطع علی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @personal instructions, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
